title: Ugly Number II
hints: Consider how every ugly number is generated by multiplying a smaller ugly number by 2, 3, or 5.
Maintain three pointers, each tracking the index of the smallest ugly number that, when multiplied by 2, 3, or 5 respectively, produces a candidate larger than the current last ugly number.
At each step, the next ugly number is the minimum of the three candidates. Advance any pointer whose candidate matched this minimum to avoid duplicates.
